name: Suspicious AppX Package Installation Attempt
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious AppX Package Installation Attempt
SIGMA Description: Detects an appx package installation with the error code "0x80073cff" which indicates that the package didn't meet the signing requirements and could be suspicious

False positives:
- Legitimate AppX packages not signed by MS used part of an enterprise

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=401 AND "Error Code"='0x80073cff' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious AppX Package Installation Attempt on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=401 AND "Error Code"='0x80073cff' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious AppX Package Installation Attempt
